TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Suga Yoshihide Suga Yoshihide (ryax sa 6 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1948 - squ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1948) mrhuw Gipun ta' misuw hya' ga Suga Yoshihide, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Suga Yoshihide minkahul sa Yuzawa na Gipun. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1948 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Prime Minister of Japan canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: s~…ēu…£a jos~…ēńßińßi*e s~…ēu…£a jos~…ēńßińßi*e (rjax s~…ēa * na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - s~…ēqu), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£ipun ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēu…£a jos~…ēńßińßi*e, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral s~…ēu…£a jos~…ēńßińßi*e minkańßul s~…ēa juzawa na …£ipun. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē prime minis~…ēter o* *apan ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
